summary: Website project with blue and green color scheme
architectural_notes: Color scheme: Blue and green combination across entire website

existing_features.title: Update the CSS color palette in frontend/src/index.css to use blue and green as the primary color combination, replacing the current vibrant color system (electric-blue, coral-pink, lime-green, sunshine-yellow, vivid-orange) with harmonious blue and green tones
Apply the new blue and green color scheme consistently across all components including navigation, cards, buttons, links, hero sections, and interactive elements

new_feature_requests.summary: Apply blue and green color combination to entire website
